PROB TRANSFER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY SENT
/CAL: APD 1203,9 TRANSFER (TO SAN MATEO CO,)/DAWT/CTORD: PROBATION TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY TO SAN MATEO COUNTY,/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED,/

/TWS/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 10D/CTS:2/X: REMAINING CJ TIME THROUGH SWAP/SWAPD:11-22-13/PF460 12/VF2:140/1463ALC/DDP2/LVAL/LCHEM/IID:1/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CTORD:DEFENDANT NOT TO DRIVE WITH ANY ALCOHOL IN HER SYSTEM/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL 2/NLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 13/TRANS 13 FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
